name: kbridge-slider-crank-overlay
description: KinematicBridge overlay for the slider-crank (the clean 1-DOF planar slice mechanism) at doc=cm. PRIMARY preview is the imported Inventor mechanism geometry at rest (Mechanism out 1 -> Custom Preview) overlaid with the CPig skeleton (design pose, kf0 seed); a separate Inventor Animate(Time) layer (contrasting tint) is available to scrub. Look for the imported parts and the CPig skeleton co-located at the same scale at rest. Capture-only (no pixel-diff, no VLM). Slop fixture: KinematicBridge/out/_slop-side-by-side/slider-crank-overlay.canary.slop.json. Requires the KinematicImporter .gha loaded.

setup.vlmDescription: Two representations of the same slider-crank mechanism in one viewport: solid shaded CAD parts (KinematicImporter) and a CPig frame-triad + link-polyline skeleton, at the same scale and co-located. A slider-crank is a crank + connecting rod driving a slider along a line.

checkpoints.name: persp
checkpoints.description: Solid slider-crank CAD parts and the CPig skeleton in one viewport, same scale, co-located at rest.

checkpoints.name: front
checkpoints.description: Front view of the same overlay: solid parts and skeleton at the same scale, co-located.
